'''鈭歴h-y-l-d''' ('''kashayledoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuld|wuld]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuld|wuld]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-y-l-d
|-
! Lemma
| kashayledoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishayledoko|thishayledoko]] || [[word:jishayledoko|jishayledoko]] || [[word:shishayledoko|shishayledoko]] || [[word:kishayledoko|kishayledoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
